name: HTTP Data Exfiltration Detected
description: A large outbound HTTP transfer was detected, indicating potential data exfiltration.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the HTTP transfer.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The source IP address of the HTTP connection.

parameters.name: destination_ip
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the HTTP connection.

parameters.name: destination_port
parameters.description: The destination port of the connection (usually 80 or 443).

parameters.name: http_method
parameters.description: The HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST).

parameters.name: request_url
parameters.description: The full URL of the HTTP request.

parameters.name: user_agent
parameters.description: The User-Agent of the HTTP request.

parameters.name: bytes_out
parameters.description: The amount of outbound bytes transferred.
